name: Text Embeddings Inference (TEI)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); self-hosted; Rust server; also available on HuggingFace Inference Endpoints

auth.notes: Self-hosted: no auth by default; HuggingFace Inference Endpoints: HF token

performance.notes: Flash Attention 2, dynamic batching; 10-100x faster than Python inference servers

agent_readiness.notes: HuggingFace's Rust-based high-performance embedding inference server. Serves sentence-transformers, E5, BGE, and reranker models. OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoint. Dynamic batching. Flash Attention 2 / CUDA kernels. Supports BERT, RoBERTa, XLM-RoBERTa. Reranker endpoint for cross-encoder models. Quantization (ONNX int8). Docker deployment. Best-in-class performance for self-hosted embeddings.

gotchas: CUDA/GPU required for best performance (CPU works but much slower)
Supports specific model architectures only (BERT family, not decoder-only)
Docker deployment required (no pip install server)
Flash Attention requires Ampere+ GPU (A100, RTX 3000+)
best_when: Replacing OpenAI text-embedding-3 with local models
Production embedding endpoints needing dynamic batching
avoid_when: Generating embeddings with decoder-only models (GPT, Llama)
summary: Text Embeddings Inference (TEI) is HuggingFace's high-performance Rust embedding server. Serves sentence-transformers, BGE, E5, and reranker models with dynamic batching and Flash Attention 2. OpenAI-compatible API. 10-100x faster than Python inference servers. Best for production RAG pipelines needing self-hosted, high-throughput embedding generation.
